steps.title: Find the favorable count
steps.content: The table shows $2$ hybrid cars priced at no more than $25{,}000$. Since one car is selected from all listed cars, the total count is $14$.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content: Probability is favorable outcomes divided by total outcomes: $$\frac{2}{14}=\frac{1}{7}$$ The answer is A.
